title: Daily Source Pass
summary: A launch-ready newsroom rhythm for finding publishable East Nashville stories without waiting on private-platform access.

stages.name: Official Records Sweep
stages.goal: Find the safest, highest-confidence morning items before the brief goes out.
stages.output: Confirmed briefs, Cone Watch items, permit quick hits, and cautious safety context.

stages.name: Business And Event Sweep
stages.goal: Catch openings, calendar items, venue posts, and food/drink updates while they still have same-day utility.
stages.output: Restaurant briefs, event listings, link briefs, and social-first posts.

stages.name: Community Temperature Check
stages.goal: Turn Facebook, Nextdoor, tips, and 311 patterns into labeled chatter or verified follow-ups.
stages.output: What People Are Mad About, lost-and-found patterns, family logistics, and tip follow-ups.

stages.name: Publish Pack
stages.goal: Choose what publishes now, what goes into the morning brief, and what needs one more receipt.
stages.output: Story queue, newsletter blocks, source notes, social captions, and video prompts.

publishQueue.decision: Publish when a parcel/case number and current status are captured.
publishQueue.why: Low-risk official data with strong East Nashville utility.

publishQueue.decision: Publish direct business posts immediately; label comments and reposts as chatter.
publishQueue.why: Restaurant openings and menu changes are likely to be shared.

publishQueue.decision: Publish themes, not unsupported accusations; link/source-note the originating chatter internally.
publishQueue.why: The private group is the best mood source, but it must stay supervised.

publishQueue.decision: Publish only with location, date window, and impact type.
publishQueue.why: Traffic/sidewalk pain is evergreen and practically useful.

accessNeeds.name: Facebook private group
accessNeeds.today: Open the group, capture the 5-10 most active or specific posts, and paste links/screenshots/source notes into the desk.
accessNeeds.guardrail: No unattended scraping. Publish private chatter as themes unless independently confirmed.

accessNeeds.name: Nextdoor
accessNeeds.today: Use for patterns only: lost pets, service complaints, family logistics, safety chatter.
accessNeeds.guardrail: Do not name private citizens or publish accusations without public confirmation.

accessNeeds.name: Instagram/X watchlists
accessNeeds.today: Seed direct business, venue, Metro, reporter, and local personality accounts.
accessNeeds.guardrail: Direct posts can confirm their own facts; third-party chatter still needs backup.
